name: TestWaitForLinReceiveError
title: TestWaitForLinReceiveError
description: Waits for the occurrence of LIN Receive Error event. Should the event not occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.
Consider to set always the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment before the function is called.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: aFrameId
parameters.description: Numeric ID of a frame whose Receive Error should be awaited.
